input.prompt: I only want to hot-reload iterate on the ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException test. How do I filter to just that test while using hot reload?

data.content: I only want to hot-reload iterate on the ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException test. How do I filter to just that test while using hot reload?
data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-14T01:50:31.932Z</current_datetime>

I only want to hot-reload iterate on the ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException test. How do I filter to just that test while using hot reload?

input.initialPrompt: I only want to hot-reload iterate on the ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException test. How do I filter to just that test while using hot reload?

data.content:
Use `dotnet watch test` with the `--filter` option:

```bash
dotnet watch test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException"
```

This will:
1. Run only the `ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException` test
2. Automatically re-run it whenever you save changes to your source files

The `~` operator means "contains", so it matches the test by name. You could also use the fully qualified name:

```
--filter "FullyQualifiedName=Contoso.Payments.Tests.PaymentProcessorTests.ProcessPayment_NegativeAmount_ThrowsException"
```
